name: @prune/read-gate
description: F16 — Dedup-VoI Read Gate. Deterministically denies a file re-read only when the exact content is provably still in context, keyed by content-SHA x compaction-epoch. Zero information loss by construction: a deny means the identical bytes are already present (same epoch, unchanged hash), so nothing is dropped. Pure state machine over hashes; no regex, no model call, no fabricated tokens.
